ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to CCP 583.410 and 583.420 (a)(1) and Government Code 68608(b). The State Bar is to be notified of all the sanction orders as required by Business and Professions Code Section 6086.7 (a)(3). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported.
